name: Fragile
overview: Captures the realistic concerns and daily lives of "fragile" teenagers without any hesitation. Shows the taboos that adolescents face during their final teenage years before becoming adults, such as dangerous love with a friend of the opposite sex and risky deviations that they enjoy while avoiding the eyes of adults.

trailers.title: [NOW STREAMING] Will These Teens Find Themselves Through The Chaos Of Youth? | Fragile | KOCOWA+
